about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Quality Furniture for a Beautiful and Comfortable Home
about.description: We specialize in designing and providing modern, high-quality furniture for homes, offices, and different spaces. Our goal is to combine comfort, beauty, and quality at an affordable price.

contact.title: We Will Help You Choose the Right Furniture
contact.description: Do you have a question about a product, price, or order? Leave your details and we will get back to you soon.
